rationale: Section 20 governs assessment at fair cash market value and early-payment discounts. It does not address homestead exemptions, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption amount creates no conflict under this provision.
quote: No property of any kind in this State shall ever be assessed for ad valorem taxes at a greater value than its fair cash market value
_note: Section 20 is not the operative constitutional provision for homestead exemptions; the relevant authority is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c). No conflict found under §20.
